meta.creator: S4SP03-IProduct-DataProduct-CLI
meta.description: Raw zone local tables — HDLFS space PM_OBJSTORE — DELTA_LAKE format

MATNR.@EndUserText.label: Material Number
MATNR.@EndUserText.quickInfo: Unique identifier of the product / material in S/4HANA

SPRAS.@EndUserText.label: Language Key
SPRAS.@EndUserText.quickInfo: ISO language key for the description (e.g. EN, DE)

MAKTX.@EndUserText.label: Product Description
MAKTX.@EndUserText.quickInfo: Short description of the product in the given language

MAKTG.@EndUserText.label: Product Description (Uppercase)
MAKTG.@EndUserText.quickInfo: Uppercase version of the product description used for search

EXTRACTION_DATE.@EndUserText.label: Extraction Date
EXTRACTION_DATE.@EndUserText.quickInfo: Date on which the record was extracted from S/4HANA into HDLFS
